properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We know where we've come from We know where we've been We embrace the truth that's taught to us by faithful men We honor the convictions of those who've gone before And we're ready now to take our place in the service of the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our generation will keep the faith Our generation will show the way Our trust is where our hope is from By grace we vow to carry on And take the gospel in to every nation We pledge our all for God has called our generation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We've taken up the standard, the banner of our Lord And we will raise it high as we unite in one accord We bravely face tomorrow knowing You're the One we trust and the God Who let our fathers is the God Who carry us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And they'll know that we've been faithful on that day When the future generation rises up to say

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our generation will keep the faith Our generation will show the way Our trust is where our hope is from By grace we vow to carry on…

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And take the gospel in to every nation We pledge our all… We pledge our all for God has called…
